query:
-- Check octane_customer_links for these 15 MSISDNs
SELECT ocl.msisdn, ocl.octaneServiceName, ocl.internalCustomerExternalId, ocl.internalCustomerName
FROM octane_customer_links ocl
WHERE ocl.msisdn IN (
  '0493802664', '0493834640', '0493835175', '0493837165', '0494655563', '0494655895',
  '0493803414', '0493834375', '0493834397', '0493834429', '0493834499', '0493834594',
  '0493834657', '0494655764', '0494655765'
)
ORDER BY ocl.msisdn;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Check octane_customer_links for these 15 MSISDNs
SELECT ocl.msisdn, ocl.octaneServiceName, ocl.internalCustomerExternalId, ocl.internalCustomerName
FROM octane_customer_links ocl
WHERE ocl.msisdn IN (
  '0493802664', '0493834640', '0493835175', '0493837165', '0494655563', '0494655895',
  '0493803414', '0493834375', '0493834397', '0493834429', '0493834499', '0493834594',
  '0493834657', '0494655764', '0494655765'
)
ORDER BY ocl.msisdn;
